parameters.query:
SELECT
  fl.feedback_id,
  fl.course_id,
  fl.sentiment,
  fl.confidence,
  f.raw_feedback
FROM feedback_labels fl
JOIN feedbacks f ON f.feedback_id = fl.feedback_id
LEFT JOIN testimonials t ON t.feedback_id = fl.feedback_id
WHERE fl.sentiment ILIKE 'positive'
  AND fl.confidence >= {{$json.confidence_threshold}}
  AND t.id IS NULL
ORDER BY fl.confidence DESC;

INSERT INTO testimonials (feedback_id, course_id, quote, author_name, sentiment, confidence, source)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'feedback_labels')
ON CONFLICT (feedback_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, feedback_id;

-- ============================================================================
-- testimonials_schema_and_dummy_data.sql
--
-- 1) Creates the `testimonials` table that the n8n workflow writes to.
-- 2) Creates `feedback_labels` if it doesn't already exist.
--    (Assumes `feedbacks` already exists with: feedback_id, course_id,
--     raw_feedback, created_at, processed.)
-- 3) Seeds dummy `feedbacks` + `feedback_labels` rows covering every branch
--    the workflow needs to handle, for manual testing in n8n.
-- ============================================================================

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 1. Target table
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS testimonials (
    id             BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    feedback_id    UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES feedbacks(feedback_id),
    course_id      UUID NOT NULL,
    quote          TEXT NOT NULL,
    author_name    VARCHAR(150),
    sentiment      VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Positive',
    confidence     FLOAT,
    is_approved    BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,   -- human review gate before publishing
    source         VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'feedback_labels',
    created_at     TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT uq_testimonials_feedback_id UNIQUE (feedback_id)
);

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 2. `feedbacks` already exists in your database with columns:
--      feedback_id UUID, course_id UUID, raw_feedback TEXT,
--      created_at TIMESTAMP, processed BOOLEAN
--    so no stub is created here. `feedback_labels` is created below only if
--    it doesn't already exist (matches the schema you originally shared).
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS feedback_labels (
    id             BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    feedback_id    UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES feedbacks(feedback_id),
    course_id      UUID NOT NULL,
    label          VARCHAR(100),
    sentiment      VARCHAR(20),
    severity       VARCHAR(20),
    confidence     FLOAT,
    owner_role     VARCHAR(50),
    actionable     BOOLEAN,
    created_at     TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 3. Dummy data (safe to re-run: guarded with NOT EXISTS)
--    Two courses, 8 feedbacks covering: high-confidence positive (should be
--    inserted), low-confidence positive (should be filtered out), negative,
--    neutral, and one positive feedback that ALREADY has a testimonial
--    (should be skipped as a duplicate).
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- Courses
--   c1 = 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111
--   c2 = 22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222

INSERT INTO feedbacks (feedback_id, course_id, raw_feedback, processed)
SELECT * FROM (VALUES
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'::uuid, '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'::uuid, 'This course completely changed how I think about data pipelines. The explanations were crystal clear and I finally understand joins.', true),
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000002'::uuid, '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'::uuid, 'I really enjoyed the hands-on labs, they helped me apply concepts immediately.', true),
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000003'::uuid, '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'::uuid, 'The pace was too fast for beginners and I felt lost during the SQL section.', true),
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000004'::uuid, '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222'::uuid, 'Great course overall, would recommend to any data analyst.', true),
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000005'::uuid, '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222'::uuid, 'Video quality was poor and audio cut out several times.', true),
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000006'::uuid, '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222'::uuid, 'Loved the community support in the Slack channel, made learning genuinely fun.', true),
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000007'::uuid, '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'::uuid, 'It was okay, nothing special but not bad either.', true),
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000008'::uuid, '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222'::uuid, 'Best course I have taken all year, the projects were incredibly practical.', true)
) AS v(feedback_id, course_id, raw_feedback, processed)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM feedbacks f WHERE f.feedback_id = v.feedback_id);

INSERT INTO feedback_labels (feedback_id, course_id, label, sentiment, severity, confidence, owner_role, actionable)
SELECT * FROM (VALUES
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'::uuid, '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'::uuid, 'clarity',       'Positive', 'low',    0.92, 'instructor', false), -- high-conf positive -> INSERT
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000002'::uuid, '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'::uuid, 'hands_on',      'Positive', 'low',    0.88, 'instructor', false), -- high-conf positive -> INSERT
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000003'::uuid, '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'::uuid, 'pacing',        'Negative', 'medium', 0.81, 'curriculum', true),  -- negative -> SKIP
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000004'::uuid, '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222'::uuid, 'general',       'Positive', 'low',    0.65, 'marketing',  false), -- positive but LOW confidence -> SKIP
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000005'::uuid, '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222'::uuid, 'video_quality', 'Negative', 'high',   0.90, 'engineering',true),  -- negative -> SKIP
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000006'::uuid, '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222'::uuid, 'community',     'Positive', 'low',    0.95, 'community',  false), -- high-conf positive -> INSERT
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000007'::uuid, '11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111'::uuid, 'general',       'Neutral',  'low',    0.55, 'marketing',  false), -- neutral -> SKIP
  ('a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000008'::uuid, '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222'::uuid, 'general',       'Positive', 'low',    0.97, 'marketing',  false)  -- positive, ALREADY has testimonial -> SKIP (dup)
) AS v(feedback_id, course_id, label, sentiment, severity, confidence, owner_role, actionable)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM feedback_labels fl
  WHERE fl.feedback_id = v.feedback_id AND fl.label = v.label
);

-- Pre-seed one testimonial so the workflow's duplicate-prevention can be tested
INSERT INTO testimonials (feedback_id, course_id, quote, author_name, sentiment, confidence, is_approved)
SELECT 'a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000008'::uuid, '22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222'::uuid,
       'Best course I have taken all year, the projects were incredibly practical.', NULL, 'Positive', 0.97, true
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM testimonials WHERE feedback_id = 'a1111111-0000-0000-0000-000000000008'::uuid
);

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Expected outcome after running the n8n workflow once against this seed data:
--   Inserted (3): feedback_id ...0001, ...0002, ...0006 (all high-confidence positive)
--   Skipped   (5): ...0003 & ...0005 (negative), ...0007 (neutral),
--                  ...0004 (positive but confidence 0.65 < 0.70 threshold),
--                  ...0008 (positive, but testimonial already exists)
--
-- Verify with:
--   SELECT feedback_id, author_name, confidence, is_approved FROM testimonials ORDER BY created_at;
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
